payment_history: string (max 3 lines summarizing last 3 months of payments - include amounts, dates, and whether each was Received or Failed)
affordability: MUST be exactly one of: HIGH, MEDIUM, LOW, VERY LOW, NOT SURE. CRITICAL: This label MUST match the conclusion of your calculation in reason_for_affordability. If your calculation concludes MEDIUM, this field MUST be MEDIUM. NOT SURE only when zero data exists.
reason_for_affordability: MANDATORY - must not be empty. Use plain English (no acronyms). Show: 1) Median of successful payments in last 3 months, 2) minimum amount due, 3) percentage, 4) label. Example: 'Median of 3 months successful payments = $0 (all failed). Minimum amount due = $251. $0/$251 = 0% → VERY LOW'. End with '→ LABEL' where LABEL matches the affordability field exactly.
willingness: MUST be exactly one of: HIGH, MEDIUM, LOW, VERY LOW, NOT SURE. CRITICAL: This label MUST match the conclusion in reason_for_willingness. NOT SURE only when zero interaction data exists.
reason_for_willingness: MANDATORY - must not be empty. Use plain English. Cite specific evidence. End with '→ LABEL' where LABEL matches the willingness field. Example: 'Customer proactively emailed requesting help on 12/11 → HIGH' or 'No response to 2 outreach attempts, broken promise to pay → LOW'
problem_description: string (max 5 lines describing the customer's core problem)
solution_evidence: string (max 5 lines citing which decision rule matched)
proposed_email_to_customer: Plain text starting with 'Subject: ...' then 'Body: ...' OR 'NO_ACTION'. Do NOT wrap in JSON objects.
arrears_clearance_plan: object or null. Only populate when Clear Arrears Plan is the recommended treatment. Contains: monthly_payment_recommended (number), surplus_above_mad (number), total_arrears (number), months_to_clear (number), projected_timeline (array of {month: number, payment: number, remaining_arrears: number}). If recommended treatment is NOT Clear Arrears Plan, set to null.
